title: The Murk - Darkness Consumes
description: A horror-themed Minecraft mod that punishes players for lingering in complete darkness.
body:
# The Murk

_(name subject to change)_

![Murk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/949f4fcc72b1e9b776c12ad4cf4959da2aeae58d.png)


[![X (formerly Twitter) Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/tiigerbones?style=for-the-badge&logo=X&color=grey)](https://twitter.com/tiigerbones) ![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/tiigerbones/themurk?display_timestamp=author&style=for-the-badge&logo=Github&color=grey) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1344335?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=grey&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-murk-darkness-consumes)

**The Murk** is a horror-themed Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that transforms darkness into a deadly threat. Venture into the shadows unprepared, and face the chilling consequences of *Murk's Grasp*, a debuff that creeps up in low light levels, bringing fear and danger to your world.


## Features

- **Murk's Grasp Effect**: 
  - Triggers in low light levels (default: below 3) after 15 seconds of darkness, with a warning message at 5 seconds.
  - Applies a harmful status effect with a dark purple hue, slowing movement by 15% and dealing scaling damage if you linger in the dark.
  - Persists for a configurable duration after entering a lit area, with optional Blindness effect.

- **Dynamic Light Detection**:
  - Supports held items, dropped items, trinket slots (via Trinkets), and nearby players’ light sources to reset the darkness timer.
  - Configurable light sources with customizable luminance and water sensitivity.
  - Integrates with **LambDynamicLights** for realistic light checks, requiring line-of-sight to light-emitting items.

- **Configurable Gameplay**:
  - Customize light thresholds, dimensions (e.g., Overworld, Nether), and effect behaviors via `config/murk.json5`.
  - Options to enable/disable underwater light checks, Creative mode effects, and warning messages.

- **NOTES**:
  - Inspired by mods like *OminousDarkness* and *Grue* but built for Fabric.

Hoping to expand more on this mod with more mechanics
